description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ⚙️ Extension Builds that allows calling with customizable float precisions and a Godot C++ branch. The workflow runs a build job on a matrix of targets with different platforms, architectures, and float precisions. For each target, it checks out the repository, gets Godot C++, sets up dependencies, loads build cache, builds the extension, and uploads the build artifact. The workflow also includes an optional merge job to combine all build artifacts into a single artifact.
